title: Lightweight_FPS
description: This Modpack Made for Low end devices. In this Modpack no extra qulity of life mods only Fps increase mods are added. This Modpack is very Lightweight
body:
### About Lightweight_FPS Modpack 

Lightweight_FPS is a carefully crafted Minecraft modpack designed with one clear goal in mind: maximum performance with minimal system load. Built specifically for players who want smoother gameplay on low to mid-end PCs or laptops, this modpack removes all unnecessary clutter and focuses purely on boosting FPS and reducing lag.

Featuring a clean and lightweight selection of optimization mods like performance enhancers (such as Sodium, Lithium, and Starlight), it ensures faster chunk loading, smoother animations, and significantly reduced RAM and CPU usage. Whether you're exploring vast worlds, building mega bases, or just enjoying survival mode, Lightweight_FPS keeps your experience buttery smooth and stable, even on older machines.

Perfect for content creators, PvP players, or casual adventurers who prefer fast loading times, stable frame rates, and a no-nonsense experience. No bloat. No distractions. Just pure performance.


<details>
<summary>Key include mods</summary>

Smooth Skies- Smooths out the skybox colors on far render distances and fixes some other skybox visual issues.

Very many player-Improve server performance

Noisium-Optimises worldgen performance for a better gameplay experience.

Sodium, Sodium Extra, Reese's Sodium Options – Improves rendering performance

Entity Culling & More culling - skipping off-screen or unnecessary visuals

threadtweak-Allows adjusting thread priorities for the game's different tasks, and when used properly, can give a nice small performance boost. Maintained version of Smooth Boot.

Lithium-Lithium is a modern, general-purpose optimization mod for Minecraft which works to improve a number of systems (game physics, mob AI, block ticking, etc)

Mod Menu, YACL, Cloth Config – UI mods for better mod management

C2me-It Improve Chunk Load Performance.

Supper Fast Math-Super Fast Math is a lightweight Fabric mod designed to enhance the performance of trigonometric calculations in Minecraft. 

Sepals- Sepals is a experimental optimization mod for minecraft server, aims to minimize latency in game-ticking simultaneously keeping the vanilla features unchanged.

Particle Core-Particle Core focuses on one thing: Optimizing particles. 



</details>
